name: DataHub MCP Server
what_it_does: Official DataHub MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with DataHub — the open-source metadata management and data catalog platform — searching data assets, querying lineage graphs, accessing schema information, and integrating DataHub's comprehensive metadata catalog into agent-driven data discovery and governance workflows.
use_cases: Searching the data catalog for relevant datasets from data discovery agents
Querying data lineage for pipeline debugging from data engineering agents
Retrieving schema information for data assets from analysis agents
Checking data quality and freshness from monitoring agents
Finding dataset owners and stewards from governance agents
Building data-aware RAG systems with metadata context from AI agents
not_for: Teams not using DataHub for data cataloging
Direct data querying (DataHub provides metadata, not data access)
Teams using Amundsen, Alation, or other data catalogs
best_when: A data team uses DataHub as their metadata catalog and wants AI agents to understand data assets — enabling agents to discover, understand, and reason about available data.
avoid_when: You use Amundsen, Alation, or another data catalog — use the appropriate MCP. DataHub is for metadata discovery, not data access.

auth.notes: DataHub personal access token required. Generate from DataHub UI Settings → Access Tokens. DataHub GMS URL must be configured.

pricing.free_tier_limits: DataHub open source: completely free and self-hosted
pricing.notes: DataHub is free open source. Official MCP from acryldata (DataHub creator). Cloud version for managed service.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted: no external limits; cloud: tier-dependent

known_agent_gotchas: DataHub deployment (GMS server) must be running and accessible
DataHub's metadata model is rich but complex — agents need context to query effectively
Official MCP from acryldata — high quality maintenance
Large enterprises may have millions of data assets — pagination critical
GraphQL API provides richer queries than REST — check which the MCP uses
Token expiration policies vary by DataHub version
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. Access token. Official from acryldata. Metadata catalog may contain sensitive data asset information.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Access token. Official MCP from acryldata. Metadata catalog may be sensitive.
